sizing_rule.note: TWR-based position sizing for multi-system portfolios to buffer equity retracements; optimal_f value not specified by author; max drawdown tolerance of 26% cited as example; formula: TWR = (1+R)^N applies across N periods for compounding equity growth

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on terminal wealth relative (TWR) calculated using the compounding formula (1+R)^N, where R is the interest rate per period and N is the number of periods, to understand equity growth and manage drawdown buffering when combining multiple trading systems.
